summary: I wrote 7 atomic business requirements to `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/requirements-writer/output/requirements.md`, based on the ask, the code-explorer's discovery notes, and the resolved clarifying-questions answers. The requirements capture: removing the toggle from the sidebar's top row, relocating it next to "Sign out" in the sidebar footer, keeping it visually grouped there, preserving its existing toggle behavior and keyboard accessibility, leaving the sign-in screen untouched, and not disturbing any other sidebar elements — all phrased in non-technical "When X happens, Y should happen" form.
